fields.description: Sequential number within the shift (Drop 1, Drop 2, etc.).
fields.label: Drop Number

fields.description: Amount the operator declared when making the drop. Never shown alongside expected totals.
fields.label: Declared Amount

fields.description: Operator's card-tip cash pull from the till at end of shift. Schema-only at Phase 1 — operators currently enter the rounded amount they took manually. Phase 2 adds system-enforced rounding (Canada nickel rule) + 'Take exactly $X' UX. See Task 34 + docs/design/tip_pull_phase2.md. R-011 in docs/risk_register.md tracks the placeholder calculator that subtracts this field once Phase 3 wires up the real system_expected math. DEC-065 documents the schema decision.
fields.label: Tip Pull from Till

fields.description: Cash you pulled from the drawer for your card tips. Enter exact amount taken; system will use this to reconcile the drawer correctly. Negative values < -$50 trigger a manager-attention warning (catches typos like -200 when -2.00 was meant).
fields.label: Tip Pull Amount

fields.description: Currency of the tip pull. Set by the controller's before_insert hook from frappe.conf.anvil_currency (Philadelphia/DC/Dallas = USD), falling back to CAD for Hamilton. No JSON default — Frappe applies static JSON defaults during Document.__init__, which would mask the venue-aware logic in before_insert.
fields.label: Tip Pull Currency

fields.description: Phase 2 settlement reconciliation field. What the processor (Fiserv/Clover) actually paid the venue for tips at T+1 settlement. Stays 0 in Phase 1; populated by the settlement-pairing job in Phase 2.
fields.label: Tip Settled via Processor

fields.description: Calculated read-only: tip_pull_amount - tip_settled_via_processor_amount. The rounding loss the venue absorbs as operating cost (e.g. operator pulled $12.70 for an actual $12.67 tip = $0.03 venue cost). Zero in Phase 1 since processor settlement amount stays 0.
fields.label: Tip Pull Difference (Operating Cost)

fields.description: Background-created POS Closing Entry to satisfy ERPNext accounting.
fields.label: POS Closing Entry
